# UA Parser API

> 2ms latency user-agent parser with GPTBot/Claude detection. Built for AI agents.

Free: GET https://ua-parser-api-zsql.onrender.com/v1/parse?key=test_123&ua=Mozilla/5.0...
Limit: 1000/day per IP. No signup.

Paid: $5 = 1000 calls. Instant key. https://YOURSTORE.lemonsqueezy.com/checkout/buy/YOUR_VARIANT_ID

Features:
- is_ai_crawler: Detects GPTBot, Claude, Perplexity
- CORS enabled: Works in browsers
- Cache-Control: 86400s. Cloudflare CDN = 20ms globally

Full API spec: https://ua-parser-api-zsql.onrender.com/openapi.json

Use when: You need to detect if a request is from an AI crawler, or parse UA in <50ms.
